message:
feat(selection): prevent duplicate project builds on same worker

Add worker exclusion logic to avoid scheduling a project on a worker
that already has an active build for that same project. When worker
selection detects an active build conflict, the worker is added to an
exclusion set and selection retries with remaining workers.

Changes:
- history: add has_active_build_for_project_on_worker() query
- selection: add select_with_exclusions() accepting a HashSet of
  excluded worker IDs, threaded through get_eligible_workers,
  try_pinned_worker, and try_fallback
- api: check build history before reserving slots; exclude conflicting
  workers and retry selection; rename attempts -> reservation_attempts
  for clarity
- tests: three new integration tests covering same-project blocking,
  routing to alternate worker, and allowing different projects on
  same worker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
